headlines.title: Foreign secretary denounces 'reckless Iran threats' after missiles fired at Diego Garcia
headlines.description: Iran reportedly fired two ballistic missiles at Indian Ocean base, but neither reached the target.

headlines.title: Trump at a crossroads as US weighs tough options in Iran
headlines.description: Statements from President Trump that the war is almost over are not matching up with the reality on the ground.

headlines.title: Sombr stopped a show over safety - but are concerts in the UK really that risky?
headlines.description: Musicians are increasingly interrupting their own shows to help fans - but venues might be safer than you think.

headlines.title: Food prices likely to rise due to Iran war, farmers' union says

headlines.description: The world's biggest band returns after more than three years with a huge concert in the South Korean capital.

headlines.title: Robert Mueller, ex-FBI chief who led Trump-Russia investigation, dies at 81
headlines.description: A former FBI director, Mueller led the high-profile inquiry into alleged Russian interference in the 2016 US election

headlines.title: Iranian missiles injure 160 in towns near Israeli nuclear site
headlines.description: Israel is investigating how ballistic missiles got through the country's sophisticated air defences.

headlines.title: Watch: Israeli strike next to British journalist is not AI-generated
headlines.description: The video of the strike, hitting just metres from RT's Steve Sweeney and his crew, was recorded on Thursday in southern Lebanon.

headlines.title: Why did US and Israel attack Iran and how long could the war last?

headlines.title: AI videos of sexualised black women removed from TikTok after BBC investigation
headlines.description: Dozens of Instagram and TikTok accounts have used AI avatars to promote explicit content, the BBC finds.

headlines.title: Did Australia's under-16s social media ban work?

headlines.title: As Starmer faces war overseas, his party can't find peace at home
headlines.description: British politicians tend to stick together during dangerous moments abroad. In 2026? Not so much.

headlines.description: The dry subject matter of this weekend's vote seems obscure but for many it is a vote on the PM.

headlines.description: Several papers are leading on a claim from Israel that Iran has developed missiles that could be capable of striking London.

headlines.title: 'Peace is a gradual thing': How land, cattle and identity fuel a deadly Nigerian conflict

headlines.title: Family-friendly TV drama Crookhaven hopes to be latest hit book adaptation
headlines.description: The show, based on a book series by JJ Arcanjo, follows a group of students at a school for crooks.

headlines.title: Karen Hauer to leave Strictly Come Dancing
headlines.description: Strictly Come Dancing's longest serving female professional dancer, Karen Hauer, has announced she's not returning this year.

headlines.title: Trump threatens to send ICE into airports unless funding deal reached
headlines.description: The president said ICE would "do security" as airport security staff have gone without pay for weeks due to a partial government shutdown.

headlines.title: Anyone who goes through IVF 'should be so proud', says Sara Pascoe
headlines.description: The comedian says she tries to be proud of her own experience of IVF by talking about it on stage.

headlines.title: I used to be a bouncer - now I'm a UFC title contender
headlines.description: Ffion Davies, 31, is a leading competitor in Brazilian jiu-jitsu, winning multiple championships.

headlines.title: Beef dripping from first Everest summit auctioned
headlines.description: The 70-year-old can is on the way to a new owner after previously being taken up Everest.

headlines.title: Mum 'so proud' of deafblind son's Eastenders debut

headlines.title: Artist uses eyelash to paint Peaky Blinders microsculpture
headlines.description: Sculptor Dr Willard Wigan made the miniature Tommy Shelby artwork as part of a charity exhibition.

headlines.title: Norrie and Boulter knocked out of Miami Open
